the inequality is 2x³ - 5x² + 3x - 7 ≥ 10.  

module 2: determine the range of x-values that satisfy the inequality  
the range of x-values is 3 ≤ x ≤ 6.  

module 3: solve the equation P(x) = 15 to find the screen width(s)  
the solution to 2x³ - 5x² + 3x - 7 = 15 is x = 3.
